offer: Consultas, visitas domiciliares e acompanhamento cirúrgico
tone: authority, trust, warmth, care, professional compassion
subject_description: a Brazilian man in his late 20s to early 30s with: (1) short dark brown hair, styled upward with slight volume at the top, (2) clean-shaven face with light facial hair, (3) light olive/fair skin tone, (4) dark eyes behind black rectangular-framed glasses, (5) bright warm smile, straight white teeth, (6) slim-medium build, (7) navy blue veterinary medical coat with white trim and 'Dr. Pedro Stipp / Médico Veterinário' embroidered on the chest, arms crossed confidently
